steps.title: Read y-values from the graph
steps.content: From the graph, at $$x=2$$ the momentum is $$y=1$$ newton‑seconds. At $$x=6$$ the momentum is $$y=3$$ newton‑seconds.

steps.title: Compute average rate of change
steps.content: The average rate of change is $$\frac{y(6)-y(2)}{6-2} = \frac{3-1}{4} = \frac{2}{4} = 0.5$$ newton‑seconds per second. The answer is 0.5.
